packs.label: Pixflow Open Design Core Pack
packs.description: Open Design prompt composer sources, discovery, directions, critique, linting, craft refs, prompt templates, and supporting assets.

packs.label: Pixflow Open Design Skills Pack
packs.description: Original Open Design skills, including the complete functional skill catalogue.

packs.label: Pixflow Open Design Templates Pack
packs.description: Original non-slide Open Design design templates with side files, assets, references, and examples.

packs.label: Pixflow Open Design Systems Pack
packs.description: Original Open Design design systems, including DESIGN.md, optional tokens.css, components.html, and support files.

packs.label: Pixflow Open Design Plugins Pack
packs.description: Bundled Open Design-derived plugin manifests, scenario routes, atom skills, example plugin assets, localized plugin metadata, formal plugin runtime contracts, and plugin design-system fixtures, excluding primary slide/deck/PPT routes.

packs.label: Pixflow Bricks Conversion Pack
packs.description: Pixflow Bricks-specific conversion skills, Bricks references, Pixflow Framework rules, and editable JSON guidance.
